## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Jakub Rudnik, discussing fwd.digital's AI-powered content marketing services and growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital has rapidly grown to \~$4M ARR in 8 months, offering AI-augmented content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [The company combines AI automation, human expertise, and scalable processes to deliver high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [fwd.digital is seeking to expand its team with experienced content strategists to help scale operations and improve technology](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [There's significant market opportunity in disrupting the $526B content marketing services industry with AI-powered solutions](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started in April 2023, projected to hit $16M ARR by end of 2024](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Currently working with 27 brands, including Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Average deal size of $180,000, with customers paying $11,000-$39,000 monthly](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Received acquisition offer for $150M (declined)](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2017.0)
  - [Planning to fundraise in January with interest from VCs like Iconic and Battery](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### Technology and Process Overview

  - [Utilizes AI for content strategy, ideation, research, and production](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Developed proprietary systems for tasks like fact-checking and content refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Uses 200+ steps in content production, spending $20-$30 on compute per piece](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Helped Swivel 5x their traffic in 4 months with 200 pieces of content](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Assisted Good Call in 45x-ing their traffic, leading to 4x ARR growth](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Vision and Market Opportunity

  - [Targeting the $526B content marketing services market](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Aiming to disrupt traditional agencies and freelancer models](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Building a marketplace of AI workflows and experts](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Generating valuable "frontier data" through expert-guided content creation](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

### Team Structure and Hiring

  - [Organized into "pods" led by managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Hiring internationally to maintain strong margins](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
  - [Interviewed 2000 candidates to hire 4, ensuring high-quality team members](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)

### Challenges and Growth Areas

  - [Scaling operations to meet demand (37.5M in active deals)](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Improving processes for strategy development and client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Enhancing technology and AI systems based on operational feedback](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Finding and onboarding top-tier talent quickly](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to consider potential collaboration opportunities with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in the first week of January (week of the 6th) to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)
  - [Explore potential roles for Jakub, possibly as a strategist, product manager, or pod leader](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)
  - [Continue scaling operations and improving technology to meet growing demand](https://fathom.video/share/qg39eusoVZxTYXWsVUK3m8fjZ-m2VFQo?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
